flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kuyper College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.6k → $27.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kuyper College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.6k → $27.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Kuyper College rose 237% between 2006 and 2009 (9.5% → 32.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kuyper College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
